text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Every time I think about that last
disappointment... I become so bitter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I will vindicate my honor, here and now. No... I must vindicate it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Because I am a proud member of the Mejiro
family!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes! I will put my strength, my resolve, my everything into it!
